_comment: Canonical test set for image generation experiments. Phase 1: 1 story, 3 pages.

rationale.1: Anchor / establishing shot — full bedroom (dresser, books, window, blue blanket), lamp still on. Required as image-to-image reference for later pages.
rationale.5: Emotional peak in dim light — Theo frozen 'like a rabbit goes still', chest tight. Tests show-don't-tell emotional expression and dim-light atmosphere.
rationale.10: Resolution moment — eyes adjust, dresser/window/books resolve in their correct positions. Tests character consistency vs page 1 AND scene-element fidelity.
